name: Eastern Longaxe
description: Jarimad nomads fight on foot only when there's no other option, but when they do, they rely on these axes - the design proved its usefulness through many battles against the heavy maaf infantry.
descriptionZh: 亚里迈德的游牧民族认为徒步战斗是下下之策，他们只有被逼无奈之时才会抽出类似的长斧、下马作战。他们曾与玛弗的重装步多次交手，这种兵器发挥了巨大的作用。
